creator: junker@jazz.snu.ac.kr
text:
When I installed teTeX-0.4 package from 2.2.7-RELEASE package directory,
After properly texconfig, it cannot make pk fonts.

Fix: 

Rebuild package from ports. Especially, MakeTeXPK script differs between
2.2.7-RELEASE package and generated by ports.
How-To-Repeat: 
# pkg_add teTeX-0.4.tgz
# texconfig
(set MODE to your printer)
(set FONT to FONTRW - it warns pk directory is missing, but it is
 not significant. it will be created)
(select XDVI and TEST) -> cannot make pk fonts.
(select DVIPS and TEST) -> cannot make pk fonts.
